title: Creamy Spicy French Garlic Stir-fry
description: A one-pot French garlic stir-fry dish infused with hot smoked paprika and featuring a creamy texture for a low-calorie-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Whole Grain Tamari (or Gluten-Free Soy Sauce)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and cook until golden brown, about 2 minutes.
Stir in celery, onion, red bell pepper, and eggplant if using. Cook for an additional 5 minutes or until vegetables soften slightly.
Pour in low-sodium chicken broth or water and let it come to a boil.
Reduce heat to medium-low, stir in tamari and smoked paprika, then gently simmer for about 10 minutes until the flavors have melded together.
In another bowl, mix together grated Parmesan cheese with 2 tbsp of olive oil. Drizzle this mixture over the vegetables.
Stir well to coat all vegetables evenly with the melted cheese and tamari sauce, cooking for an additional 3-5 minutes until everything is heated through.
Remove from heat and serve hot with a side salad or crusty bread.
